race_name: L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift

top_categories.workout_context: 75 miles on paved Provencal roads culminating in a legendary burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
9,843ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
131ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
At L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift. Train it until it feels boring.
Base fitness for L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift's paved Provencal roads culminating in a legendary forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 75 miles.
9,843ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Provencal roads culminating in a legendary. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
The aerobic base that lets you ride paved Provencal roads culminating in a legendary at tempo for 75 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 9,843ft of climbing on paved Provencal roads culminating in a legendary does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.heat: August in Route changes annually (2026: Vaison-la-Romaine to Mont Ventoux, Provence) can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift’s 75 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at L'Etape du Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, VO2max, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 75 miles of paved provencal roads culminating in a legendary summit finish in Route changes annually (2026: Vaison-la-Romaine to Mont Ventoux, Provence).
